'''zhadïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnodontiform|pycnodontiform]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnodontiform|pycnodontiform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| zhadïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zhædïfzïfth || zhædïfzïfj || zhædïfzïfsh || zhædïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zhadïfdïfzïfth || zhadïfdïfzïfj || zhadïfdïfzïfsh || zhadïfdïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zhadïfzïfth || zhadïfzïfj || zhadïfzïfsh || zhadïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zhadïffzïffth || zhadïffzïffj || zhadïffzïffsh || zhadïffzïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zhadïfzïfïf || zhadïfzïfïf || zhadïfzïfïf || zhadïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || zhadïfzïfth || zhadïfzïfj || zhadïfzïfsh || zhadïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zhadïfzïfïfl || zhadïfzïfïfl || zhadïfzïfïfl || zhadïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zhadïfzïfïfïf || zhadïfzïfïfïf || zhadïfzïfïfïf || zhadïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || zhadïfzïfïfn || zhadïfzïfïfn || zhadïfzïfïfn || zhadïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zhadïfzïfïforo || zhadïfzïfïforo || zhadïfzïfïforo || zhadïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
